meta.name: Priyanka J
meta.title: Full Stack & AI Engineer
meta.tagline: I build things that make life a little easier — one commit at a time.

timeline.title: BCA Foundations
timeline.description: Started with computer science fundamentals — algorithms, OS, networks, databases. Three years laying the groundwork before touching production.

timeline.title: Founding Engineer
timeline.description: Patient apps, AI care management, partner integrations, and HIPAA-grade infrastructure — the platform powering modern primary care from intake to outcomes.

details.tagline: The operating system for primary care.

stats.label: Care Efficiency
stats.detail: Medical AI agent automates booking, vitals review, prescriptions, care plans, and care-gap detection — single-handedly running care management.

stats.label: Standard
stats.detail: US healthcare compliance and security architecture wired into every layer of the stack — patient data protected by design.

stats.label: Scope
stats.detail: Customer app, WhatsApp, and partner APIs — patients meet care wherever they already are, no separate workflow required.

features.name: Medical AI Agent
features.description: AI care manager that books consultations, reviews vitals, generates prescriptions, drafts care plans, and surfaces care gaps autonomously — 15× care manager efficiency, 30% more billing.

features.name: Customer App
features.description: Patient-facing engagement layer driving sustained daily interaction — 40% increase in platform users, averaging 1 hour per user per month.

features.name: WhatsApp Chatbot
features.description: Conversational consultation booking. Patients schedule, reschedule, and prep for care without leaving WhatsApp — 30% increase in bookings.

features.name: Partner Integrations
features.description: API connectors and data pipelines expanding the platform across the US healthcare ecosystem — 30% growth in US business.

timeline.title: Back to School (Again)
timeline.description: Started MCA at VIT online. Leveling up theory while shipping in production — a feedback loop where each side sharpens the other.

timeline.title: Built a Company
timeline.description: Real-time ROS2 observability, AI-assisted root cause analysis, and fleet-wide diagnostics — the platform for teams running autonomous machines that cannot afford to be offline.

stats.label: Robot MTTR
stats.detail: Diagnose and recover from fleet-wide incidents before the next shift starts.

stats.label: Platform
stats.detail: Built on the middleware the industry actually runs. No translation layer, no lossy bridge.

stats.label: Scope
stats.detail: One pane across every robot, every node, every topic — from lab bench to production floor.

features.name: Real-time Observability
features.description: Live topic graphs, node health, message rates, and QoS diagnostics streamed across the fleet.

features.name: AI-assisted RCA
features.description: Autonomous correlation across nodes, transforms, and sensor streams — the agent tells you why the robot stopped, not just that it did.

features.name: Fleet Diagnostics
features.description: Cross-vehicle pattern detection. Firmware regressions and hardware-cohort drift surface at the fleet level before they surface at the robot level.

features.name: Anywhere Access
features.description: Debug a robot in the field from a laptop. Remote triage without a VPN dance, without a bridge, without flying an engineer out.

timeline.title: Open Source
timeline.description: On the side, I built and open-sourced a production-grade SRE platform — full-stack site reliability tooling any team can self-host and deploy for free.

details.tagline: Production-grade site reliability, free for any team.

stats.label: Deployment
stats.detail: Fully containerised stack — any team can clone, configure, and run production-grade SRE tooling on their own infrastructure at zero cost.

stats.label: Intelligence
stats.detail: Anomaly detection and AI healing recommendations surface the root cause and suggest fixes before incidents escalate.

stats.label: Response
stats.detail: A background daemon monitors system health and executes remediation actions autonomously — reducing manual on-call toil to near zero.

features.name: AWS Monitoring
features.description: Deep integration with AWS services — tracks resource health, latency, error rates, and infrastructure metrics in real time across the entire stack.

features.name: Slack Alerts
features.description: Intelligent alerting piped directly into Slack — incidents surface instantly with context, severity, and suggested next steps, no dashboard-watching required.

features.name: Status Page
features.description: Public-facing status page auto-updated from live monitoring data — keeps users informed during incidents without manual updates.

features.name: Anomaly Detection
features.description: Statistical anomaly detection over time-series metrics — catches degradations and outliers before they cross hard alert thresholds.

features.name: AI Healing Recommendations
features.description: AI layer that analyses incident context and system state to recommend targeted remediation steps — turns raw alerts into actionable fixes.

features.name: Auto-Healing Daemon
features.description: Always-on background daemon that watches for known failure patterns and executes pre-defined recovery actions automatically — self-healing infrastructure out of the box.

timeline.title: Still Building
timeline.description: Full stack. AI. Always solving something. The story continues — and the next chapter is being written in commits.
